text:
Rick Sanchez (D716-B) is a co-anchor for the news channel CN on the Citadel of Ricks. He is from Dimension (D716-B).

Rick hosted the Citadel Morning News alongside Rick D716. The two reported on the Citadel's first democratic election, which ultimately resulted in the Morty candidate becoming president.

President Morty later destroyed the Citadel, and D716 was killed after attempting to escape through a portal with tainted fluid. D716-B then took his counterpart's place and advised the news' viewers to buy prescription drugs, after D716 criticised them.

It is unknown if he survived the destruction of the Citadel, but he was likely killed.

Rick D716-B, being a scarred version of Rick D716, had a grudge against him for his appearance.
